issue_title: Numeric range filter excludes rows exactly on the boundary

structured_output.root_cause_analysis: `utils/filters.py` used strict `<`/`>` instead of inclusive bounds for numeric range filters.
structured_output.resolution_summary: Switched the numeric range filter to inclusive comparisons so boundary values are retained.

code_diff:
--- a/superset/utils/filters.py
+++ b/superset/utils/filters.py
@@
-    return col > lo and col < hi
+    return col >= lo and col <= hi

worklog.message: Investigate and fix issue #9001: Numeric range filter excludes rows exactly on the boundary
Reproduced the issue, identified the root cause and opened a PR. Switched the numeric range filter to inclusive comparisons so boundary values are retained.
